final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-art
Asset type: cozy lifestyle illustration, square crop
Primary request: a fluffy orange cat sunbathing on a windowsill while snow falls outside
Scene/backdrop: cozy indoor room with wooden windowsill, snowy winter street view through the window, soft snowfall visible outside
Subject: orange tabby cat with fluffy thick fur, relaxed sprawled posture, eyes half-closed in contentment, warm and soft appearance
Style/medium: digital illustration, healing/kawaii aesthetic, soft painterly style
Composition/framing: medium shot, cat centered on windowsill, window frame creating natural frame-within-frame
Lighting/mood: warm golden afternoon sunlight streaming through window, contrast between warm interior and cool exterior, peaceful and comforting mood
Color palette: warm amber and cream interior tones + cool blue-white snow outside + orange fur accents
Materials/textures: fluffy fur with visible softness, smooth wooden windowsill, frosted glass, soft snow texture
Constraints: maintain the fluffy tactile quality that evokes tenderness, keep the contrast between warm interior and cold exterior
Avoid: realistic photography style, harsh shadows, cluttered background, plastic-looking fur
